|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/ce86r25lrxno |access-date=27 September 2025 |work=BBC Sport |date=27 September 2025}} |} ==Challenge Cup== {{main|2025 Challenge Cup}} On 25 June 2024, the [[Rugby Football League|RFL]] announced a change to the Challenge Cup format, totalling 7 rounds compared to the previous 9, with Super League teams entering to play away from home at round 3.{{Cite web |date=25 June 2024 |title=New format for Betfred Challenge Cup in 2025 |url=https://www.rugby-league.com/article/62890/new-format-for-betfred-challenge-cup-in-2025 |access-date=27 December 2024 |website=[[Rugby Football League]]}} Leeds Rhinos were drawn on 14 January to play the [[Wests Warriors]], who play in the [[Southern Conference League]], in Round 3, following fixtures in Rounds 1 and 2 that eliminated the [[British Army Rugby League|British Army]] and the [[Royal Navy Rugby League|Royal Navy rugby league teams]] from contention.{{cite news |title=Holders Wigan face possible Sheffield tie in cup |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cj48vxx28rlo |access-date=14 January 2025 |work=BBC Sport |date=14 January 2025}} The fixture was originally set to be played away at Wests Warriors' Twyford Avenue Sports Ground venue in [[Acton, London|Acton]], however both teams later agreed to swap the venue to the Headingley Rugby Stadium.{{cite news |last1=Bower |first1=Aaron |title=Leeds Rhinos confirm venue switch, kick-off time for Challenge Cup clash |url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/leeds-rhinos-confirm-venue-switch-kick-off-time-for-challenge-cup-clash |access-date=28 January 2025 |work=Love Rugby League |date=28 January 2025}} Following their victory against the Wests Warriors, Leeds Rhinos were drawn on 15 February to play [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]] away at the [[Totally Wicked Stadium]] on 14 March.{{cite news |last1=Olawumi |first1=Ben |title=Challenge Cup Fourth Round draw as 11 Super League sides discover opponents |url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/challenge-cup-fourth-round-draw-as-11-super-league-sides-discover-opponents |access-date=15 February 2025 |work=Love Rugby League |date=15 February 2025}} Leeds were ultimately knocked out of the 2025 Challenge Cup by St Helens during the Round 4 fixture.{{cite news |last1=Bower |first1=Aaron |title=Kyle Feldt sparks St Helens' Challenge Cup cruise against Leeds |url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2025/mar/14/st-helens-leeds-challenge-cup-match-report-rugby-league |access-date=14 March 2025 |work=The Guardian |date=14 March 2025
